about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Learn about Dijital Enderun
about.missionText: To contribute to the professional development of students, academics, and public servants by offering high-quality, up-to-date and accessible educational content in the field of political science and public administration; to spread knowledge in the field by leveraging the possibilities of the digital age.
about.visionText: To be Turkey's most trusted digital knowledge source in political science and public administration; to lead the digital transformation of the field by bridging students, academics and public servants.
about.description1: Dijital Enderun is a digital platform founded in 2023 that brings together undergraduate and graduate students studying political science and public administration, academics working in this field, and public servants serving in public institutions and organizations.
about.description2: With Dijital Enderun, we aim to create a platform equipped with the necessities of the digital age we live in, where students, academics and public servants can benefit from, exchange knowledge and ideas, and produce content related to the field using alternative social media channels.
about.studentsDesc: Undergraduate and graduate students studying political science and public administration.
about.academicsDesc: Academics and researchers working in this field.
about.publicServantsDesc: Public servants serving in public institutions and organizations.
about.contentDesc: SBKY and legislation lecture notes, current resources, educational materials and exam preparation content.
about.currentInfoDesc: Real-time tracking of Official Gazette announcements, job postings and legislation changes.
about.exchangeDesc: Content production and mutual interaction related to the field through social media channels.
